description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named crossbuild-mingw that runs on push to main branch and tags, and on pull requests to main. The workflow has write permissions to repository contents. It uses a matrix strategy to build for win32 and win64 architectures on ubuntu-24.04, checking out the code, setting up ccache, installing dependencies, setting up Python 3.12, installing Python dependencies, building, testing, and archiving artifacts. A separate release job creates and populates a release with the artifacts when a tag is pushed.
